## Plan: Add User Endpoint with React Form

### Context
This plan adds a FastAPI endpoint for user creation and a React component
to collect user input via a form.

### Tasks
| # | Task | Agent | Deliverable |
|---|------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | Create FastAPI endpoint POST /users | api-specialist | `backend/routes/users.py` |
| 2 | Build React component UserForm | frontend-engineer | `src/components/UserForm.tsx` |
